items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 109.4 mph at a 7.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Washington Nationals, KC 3, WSH 7. Beck Way led the night, working 2.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 2 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 109.4 mph.
items.title: Royals at Nationals Recap
